{
  "claims": [
    "California is America's destination for dreams and opportunities.",
    "California is home to one of the world’s largest and strongest economies.",
    "The anxiety that many Californians are feeling stems from the high cost of living.",
    "Affordable decent housing is a civil rights struggle of our time.",
    "Every worker has the right to live near their jobs in the communities they serve.",
